narrative:
05 congressional district has 513,238 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.0% D−R vs -10.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
